data.title: Climb Bio, Inc. Announces $110.0 Million Private Placement
data.description: In Wellesley Hills, Mass., on April 28, 2026, Climb Bio, Inc. (Nasdaq: CLYM), a clinical-stage biotechnology firm focusing on therapeutics for immune-mediated disorders, disclosed a securities purchase deal with a limited number of institutional accredited investors. The agreement entails the sale of securities in a private placement, generating total gross earnings of around $110.0 million. This amount is before accounting for placement agent fees and other offering costs. The closure of the private placement is anticipated around April 29, 2026, pending the fulfillment of usual closing prerequisites.

data.title: Kandi Technologies Reports Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: In Jinhua, China, on April 28, 2026, Kandi Technologies Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: KNDI) shared its financial performance for the fiscal year concluded on December 31, 2025. Kandi Technologies Group, Inc., known for its innovations in smart equipment and technology solutions, provided an overview of its annual earnings.

data.title: BLINDED ASSESSMENT OF ACTION3 STATISTICAL ASSUMPTIONS COMPLETE
data.description: A recent external statistical review of the ACTION3 data has successfully met its goal by verifying that the study maintains appropriate statistical power of over 90%. This ensures the ability to show a treatment impact on the primary endpoint of proteinuria. The verification provides confidence in the study's ability to demonstrate the desired effect if DMX-200 is used.
Gogo to announce Q1 2026 financial results on May 7th, 2026.

data.title: DoubleDown Interactive to Report 2026 First Quarter Results on May 12 and Host Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: South Korean company DoubleDown Interactive Co., Ltd. (NASDAQ: DDI) will be releasing its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on May 12, 2026. The announcement will be made after the market closes, with a conference call and webcast scheduled for 4:30 p.m. ET (1:30 p.m. PT) on the same day. The call and webcast are open to the public, where DoubleDown management will discuss the financial results, provide a business update, and engage in a question-and-answer session.

data.title: Axogen, Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: The company has increased its projected annual revenue growth to a minimum of 20%, equivalent to a total of $270 million.

data.title: adMarketplace Launches AI Discover Beta to Improve Consumer Discovery in AI Search
data.description: In New York on April 28, 2026, adMarketplace, a prominent Native Search™ advertising expert, revealed the introduction of its AI Discover Program's Beta version. This program aims to elevate AI chat ad interactions by incorporating pertinent, performance-oriented CPC ads. The initiative has successfully attracted new publisher collaborators, signifying a strategic move to enrich AI chat experiences. This innovative approach promises to enhance user engagement and drive notable results.

data.title: Homebuilder LGI Homes, Inc. boosts full-year margin guidance following strong Q1 2026 results.
data.description: In recent news, it has been reported that a total of 1,500 individuals have been affected by the recent outbreak of a rare virus in a specific region. Out of this number, 200 cases have been confirmed positive for the virus, with 30 individuals currently in critical condition. Health authorities are working diligently to contain the spread of the virus and provide necessary medical care to those affected. Additionally, a total of 500 individuals have been placed under quarantine as a precautionary measure. The situation is being closely monitored, and further updates will be provided as the investigation progresses.

data.title: Mars Accelerates Clean Energy Transition in Europe Through Landmark Agreement in Lithuania
data.description: Mars has signed a long-term power purchase agreement (PPA) to secure the majority output from the Skuodas Wind Farm in Lithuania. This project is anticipated to produce about 490 gigawatt-hours (GWh) of renewable electricity each year. This amount of renewable energy is estimated to help avoid around 120,000 metric tons of CO₂ emissions annually.

data.title: Chicago Atlantic BDC, Inc. Announces Date for First Quarter 2026 Results Release and Conference Call
data.description: Chicago Atlantic BDC, Inc. disclosed its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 today. The company, listed as LIEN on NASDAQ, functions as a specialty finance company under the regulation of a business development company. The announcement was made in New York on April 28, 2026, without specifying the actual financial numbers.

data.title: Aurora Advances Global Medical Cannabis Portfolio with New Product Launches Across Key International Markets
data.description: Aurora Cannabis, listed on NASDAQ and TSX as ACB, recently reported strong results for the first quarter. The company has implemented a medical-first approach, launching new products to enhance access for consumers. These launches have proven successful in Canada, Europe, and Australia, catering to the increasing demand in the international medical markets. Aurora Cannabis continues to prioritize quality in its products, indicating a promising trajectory for future growth.

data.title: Studio City Announces Earnings Release Date
data.description: Studio City International Holdings Limited, a renowned integrated resort based in Cotai, Macau, is set to disclose its unaudited financial results for the initial quarter of 2026 on April 30, 2026. The release date for the report is Thursday, emphasizing transparency and accountability in the operations of the company. The information will be crucial for stakeholders, investors, and analysts to assess the performance and financial standing of Studio City International Holdings Limited. This update signifies the commitment of the company towards providing timely and relevant information to the public.

data.title: Byreal Expands Agent-Native Trading to Perpetual Futures with Byreal Perps Agent Skills
data.description: Dubai, United Arab Emirates - April 28, 2026 - Byreal, a decentralized exchange (DEX) that has been supported by Bybit and designed for the Solana ecosystem, has revealed the introduction of Byreal Perps Agent Skills. This new offering expands its agent-native trading capabilities to include perpetual futures. As a result, users are now able to engage in trading activities through this innovative platform.

data.title: Rithm Capital Corp. Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In New York, Rithm Capital Corp. (NYSE: RITM) released its first quarter financial results for the period ending March 31, 2026. Despite market challenges, the company saw positive Q1 performance. Newrez achieved a 19% annualized operating ROE, while Genesis experienced an 80% year-over-year increase in originations. Additionally, Rithm's asset management platform expanded to around $60 billion in assets under management (AUM). Michael Nierenberg, the CEO of Rithm Capital, commented on the strong results.

data.title: Jack Dorsey's company reveals holding $2.2 billion in Bitcoin, with $1.5 billion for customers and $692 million for treasury.
data.description: According to a recent third-party audited disclosure, a fintech company has revealed that they hold $1.5 billion worth of customer Bitcoin and $692 million in corporate treasury holdings.

data.title: Pentair Reports Strong First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Pentair plc, a global water solutions leader, reported a 3% increase in sales for the first quarter of 2026, totaling $1,037 million. Excluding external factors like currency rates, acquisitions, and divestitures, core sales grew by 1% during the same period. Earnings per diluted share from continuing operations ("EPS") for Q1 2026 stood at $0.98.
